name: Kaladin
description: A battle medic turned slave turned Knight Radiant. Windrunner of the order of the Knights Radiant.

name: Shallan Davar
description: A young scholar from House Davar. Travels to meet Princess Jasnah to become her ward.

name: Dalinar Kholin
description: Highprince of House Kholin. The Bondsmith, known as the Blackthorn.

name: Adolin Kholin
description: Dalinar's eldest son. A talented duelist and warrior, known for his charisma and style.

name: Jasnah Kholin
description: Princess of Alethkar and renowned scholar. Discoverer of the Knights Radiant secrets.

name: Szeth
description: The Assassin in White. A Skybreaker from Shinovar forced to obey whoever holds his oathblade.

name: Navani Kholin
description: Widow of King Gavilar, mother of Jasnah. A brilliant scholar and engineer of fabrials and anti-light.

name: Sigzil (Nomad)
description: A former Windrunner from Roshar, now known as Nomad, fleeing across the Cosmere.

name: Venli
description: A singer who becomes a Knight Radiant of the order of Willshapers.

name: Taravangian
description: King of Kharbranth. A complex figure who becomes the new Vessel of Odium.

name: Lift
description: A young Radiant who can use stormlight to fuel her abilities in unusual ways.

name: Taln
description: Herald of War. The Unbroken. Endured millennia of torture on Braize without breaking.

name: Ash (Shalash)
description: Herald of Beauty. Known for destroying artwork depicting herself.

name: Nale
description: Herald of Justice. Leader of the Skybreaker order.

name: Vin
description: A street urchin from Luthadel who discovers she is a Mistborn. Joins Kelsier to overthrow the Lord Ruler.

name: Kelsier
description: The Survivor of Hathsin. A Mistborn who leads the rebellion against the Lord Ruler.

name: Elend Venture
description: Heir to House Venture and later king. A philosopher and idealist who dreams of democracy.

name: Sazed
description: A Terris Keeper, scholar and feruchemist. Serves as advisor and bearer of religious knowledge.

name: Marsh
description: Kelsier's older brother. Dedicated to the skaa rebellion. Later becomes a Steel Inquisitor.

name: The Lord Ruler
description: The immortal ruler of the Final Empire. His true identity and origins are shrouded in mystery.

name: Spook
description: A young Tineye from Kelsier's crew. Known for his loyalty and quiet nature.

name: Waxillium Ladrian
description: A Mistborn and lawman from the Roughs. Inherits the title of lord of House Ladrian.

name: Wayne
description: Wax's partner. An eccentric feruchemist with a talent for disguises and thievery.

name: Marasi Colms
description: Steris's half-sister. A student of the law and Mistborn, seeking justice in Elendel.

name: Steris Harms
description: Waxillium's fiancée. A meticulous, organized, and surprisingly brave woman.

name: TenSoon
description: A kandra of the Third Generation who helps Vin and eventually gains his freedom.

name: Raoden
description: Prince of Arelon, transformed by the Shaod of Elantris. Finds purpose among the fallen.

name: Sarene
description: Princess of Teod. Intelligent and diplomatic. Arrives in Arelon for a political marriage.

name: Wan ShaiLu
description: A master Forger from Sel, skilled in the art of soulforging.

name: Hrathen
description: A high priest of Fjordell sent to convert Arelon. Fierce in his faith but tormented by doubt.

name: Vasher
description: Kalad the Usurper. A warrior skilled in Awakening who carries a sentient sword.

name: Nightblood
description: A sentient sword forged with the purpose of destroying evil. Dangerously literal.

name: Siri
description: The younger princess of Idris, unexpectedly sent to T'Telir in her sister's place.

name: Vivenna
description: Princess of Idris, trained from childhood to save her kingdom by marrying the god-king.

name: Susebron
description: The God-King of T'Telir, whose breath is the key to Nalthis's power.

name: Lightsong
description: A god of the Court of Gods who doubts his own purpose and seeks answers.

name: Khriss
description: A scholar from Taldain who studies the investiture systems of the Cosmere.

name: Kenton
description: A sand master of Taldain, the last of the Diem.

name: Hoid
description: A mysterious wanderer who appears throughout the Cosmere. Tells stories and seeks something he lost.

name: Silence Montane
description: A shadow hunter and innkeeper on Threnody, fighting to survive in a world of deadly shades.

name: Nazh
description: A mysterious collector of maps and information who works for Khriss.

name: Tress
description: A young woman from a remote island who crosses spore seas to rescue her love.
